title: WiFi Overview
description: WiFi client, mesh, and wired port stats from Orbi APs

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_clients" and r._field == "client_count" and r.band == "5GHz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.ap}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_clients" and r._field == "client_count" and r.band == "2.4GHz")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.ap}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: r.ap + " " + r.mac}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "tx_rate_mbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "tx " + r.ap + " " + r.mac}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wifi_station" and r._field == "rx_rate_mbps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "rx " + r.ap + " " + r.mac}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mesh_peer" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.ap + " ← " + r.peer_ap}))

panels.title: Mesh Airtime Link Metric
panels.description: Lower is better. High values indicate a degraded mesh link.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mesh_peer" and r._field == "airtime_link_metric")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r._value, _field: r.ap + " ← " + r.peer_ap}))

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wired_port" and r._field == "rx_bytes")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 8.0, _field: "rx " + r.ap + "/" + r.port}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "wired_port" and r._field == "tx_bytes")
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 8.0, _field: "tx " + r.ap + "/" + r.port}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Mesh Radio — TX Retries & Failures (all APs)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mesh_peer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_retries" or r._field == "tx_failed")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "client_retries" and r.band == "2.4GHz")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_retries" or r._field == "tx_failed")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netstats")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "client_retries" and r.band == "5GHz")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_retries" or r._field == "tx_failed")
  |> derivative(nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
